basics.name: Atul Ramgopal Shahu
basics.title: Senior Data Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Data Engineer with 8+ years of experience designing, owning, and scaling enterprise-grade data platforms. End-to-end owner of the Snowflake Data Platform at Bidgely, responsible for platform architecture, governance, cost optimization, marketplace products, and GenAI analytics enablement.

achievements.context: Achieved Snowflake cost reduction multiple times, delivering recurring savings via warehouse right-sizing, query optimization, DBT refactoring, and data lifecycle controls.
Designed and governed Snowflake account architecture, including RBAC model, environment separation, workload isolation, and access standards.
Led Snowflake Marketplace and Native App (SPCS) development, enabling secure external data and application distribution.
Driving GenAI analytics enablement on Snowflake using Cortex Analyst, Cortex Search, and Streamlit for natural-language insights.
Architected and operated high-volume ingestion pipelines using Firehose, S3, Spark (EMR), Snowpipe, and COPY INTO.
Owned DBT at platform scale, including modeling standards, macros, testing strategy, documentation, and CI/CD pipelines.
Act as technical owner and decision-maker for data platform strategy, evolution, and best practices across teams.

bullets: End-to-end owner of the Snowflake Data Platform, responsible for architecture, RBAC, governance, billing, performance optimization, and platform reliability.
Architected scalable ingestion pipelines using AWS Firehose → S3 → Spark (EMR) → Snowflake, supporting high-volume batch and near-real-time workloads.
Owned DBT at platform scale, defining modeling standards, tests, macros, documentation, and CI/CD pipelines to enable reliable analytics across teams.
Improved data quality, performance, and analytics velocity through standardized transformations.
Ensured platform reliability and performance across large-scale data volumes.
Optimized Spark workloads on EMR through job tuning, partitioning strategies, and resource sizing, significantly improving pipeline performance and cost efficiency.
Led Snowflake Marketplace initiatives, including data listings and Native App development using Snowpark Container Services (SPCS).
Built GenAI-powered analytics solutions using Cortex Analyst, Cortex Search, and Streamlit, enabling natural language insights and enterprise search.
Lead and mentor teams on Snowflake, DBT, and platform best practices.
Responsible for drafting project execution strategy, along with problem statements, solutions, and approach for insurance client.
Worked on technical documentation, strategy, approach and solutions to snowflake migration and enhancement.
Working as Snowflake and DBT SME for implementing migration strategy and processes.
Created DBT models for all the data transformation.
Implemented Github and Gitlab devops pipelines for DBT and snowflake deployment
Worked on complex views and tables to meet reporting needs for different stakeholders.
Client engagement experience from requirement gathering and presenting solutions to various problems.
Created new data validation processes to validate the data at different levels after every data load activity.
Snowflake Developer with Azure ADF and DevOps exposure
ELT and ETL using DBT (Data Build Tool)
Worked with a Retailer client on Data Engineering for Revenue Management Dashboard.
Created ADF pipelines for data load and orchestration.
Client engagement experience from requirement gathering and presenting solutions to various problems
ETL/ELT developer with hands on experience to AWS and Snowflake
Worked on PII data with masking and tokenisation methodologies.
Experienced on SFTP and PGP encryption.
Hands on experience on data warehousing of Media and Retail domain data.
End to End Project experience on AWS, Informatica Power Center, Talend, Tableau and PowerBi
Experience of working on huge volume of Youtube data and creating a warehouse in snowflake
Assisted on data warehousing for transactional system
Sales data analysis
Java development
Data warehousing and Informatica
Informatica Powercenter hands on experience

items: DBT (models, macros, tests, CI/CD, performance refactors)

bullets: Gold medalist in graduation with CGPA of 9.45

certifications: Oracle Certified Java Associate, Java SE 7 Programmer
